question.text:
Dear Keran sama

Good day

 

I noticed that CULVNGO2600108 has another container.

On Allegro charge handling by booking , CULVNGO2600108 has 7 containers as below.



 

But I noticed that CULVNGO2600108 has another container.



 

Would you advise how to add this container to booking CULVNGO2600108 in the charge handling by booking section?

 

Thank you

 

Best Regards.

 

Amane AOKI（青木　周）

Account Manager – Liner Div.

Ben Line Agencies - Tokyo, Japan

Tel | +81-3-6718-0741 |

Email : amane.aoki@benline.com <mail

Website : https://benline.com/ <https://benline.com/> 

 

 


To: BLA Japan - CUL Docs <cul.docs.jp@be
question.summary: Dear Keran sama Good day I noticed that CULVNGO2600108 has another container. On Allegro charge hand...

answer.text:
Good day Amane,

If this container is confirmed to belong to the booking, you can attach it to the slot and then perform a manual calculation.



Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Monday, March 23, 2026 at 16:46

Cc: Document Center1 <documentcenter1@culines.com>, Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines.com>, Chris Xiao/CUL-NAS/DOC <chrisxiao@culines.com>, #CUL Allegro Support <allegrosupport@culines.com>, BLA
